violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

The following equipment were observed in poor repair: 1) The tip of a knife was damaged/missing. PIC instructed to remove knife from use 2) The handle of a refrigeration unit was missing New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
The plumbing under the three bay sink was in poor repair (active leak observed under left most bay). New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in front prep and back storage/ware-washing areas. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
A partition in the front prep area and the upper area of the mop sink were observed in poor repair (exposed wood present at both areas). New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

The following areas throughout the physical facilities were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) The floor in the walk-in had food debris 2) The ceiling tiles and vents in the ware-washing and bar areas had dust and debris 3) The wall and fans of the walk-ins had dust and biofilm New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024
